intro: Psychotria campyloneuroides, also known as Kamani, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, Kamani has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties.
